attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
NPTL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT     ,
NPTL.DISTI_TO_RESELLER_SO_NUMBER   ,
Sum(CASE WHEN DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('OFFSET','BIB OFFSET') THEN -1*NPTL.BASE_LIST_UNIT_PROD_PRICE_AMT *NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100 *Coalesce(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100  
WHEN  DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED','BIB')  THEN  NPTL.BASE_LIST_UNIT_PROD_PRICE_AMT *NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100 *Coalesce(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100 
ELSE NULL END)  AS  BASE_LIST_UNIT_PROD_PRICE_AMT,  
NPTL.TRANSACTION_DATE ,
Sum(CASE WHEN DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('OFFSET','BIB OFFSET') THEN -1*NPTL.GLBL_PRC_LST_UNT_PRC_USD_AMT*NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100  *Coalesce(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100 
WHEN  DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED','BIB') THEN NPTL.GLBL_PRC_LST_UNT_PRC_USD_AMT*NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100 *Coalesce(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100 ELSE NULL END) AS  GLBL_PRC_LST_UNT_PRC_USD_AMT ,  
Sum(CASE WHEN DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('OFFSET','BIB OFFSET') THEN -1*NPTL.GLBO_PRC_LST_UNT_PRC_LCL_AMT*NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100 *Coalesce(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100 
WHEN  DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED','BIB') THEN GLBO_PRC_LST_UNT_PRC_LCL_AMT*NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100 *Coalesce(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100  ELSE NULL END) AS GLBO_PRC_LST_UNT_PRC_LCL_AMT,  
NPTL.DIST_RPTD_SALES_REP_NAME      ,
NPTL.DIST_RPTD_CISCO_SO_NUM        ,
NPTL.DISTI_SO_LINE_NUMBER          ,
NPTL.DISTI_2_CISCO_PO_NUMBER       ,
Sum(CASE WHEN DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('OFFSET','BIB OFFSET') THEN -1*NPTL.WHLSL_PRC_LST_UNT_PRC_USD_AMT*NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100  *Coalesce(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100 
WHEN  DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED','BIB') THEN WHLSL_PRC_LST_UNT_PRC_USD_AMT*NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100 *Coalesce(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100  ELSE NULL END) AS WHLSL_PRC_LST_UNT_PRC_USD_AMT,  
Sum(CASE WHEN DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('OFFSET','BIB OFFSET') THEN -1*NPTL.WHSL_PRC_LST_UNT_PRC_LCL_AMT*NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100 *Coalesce(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100 
WHEN  DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED','BIB') THEN WHSL_PRC_LST_UNT_PRC_LCL_AMT*NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100 *Coalesce(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100  ELSE NULL END) AS WHSL_PRC_LST_UNT_PRC_LCL_AMT , 
NPTL.DISTI_SBMTD_CISCO_CONTRACT_NUM,
NPTL.DST_SBMTD_CSCO_CTRCT_TYP_DESCR,
NPTL.DISTI_2_DISTI_TRX_FLAG        ,
NPTL.DISTRIBUTOR_REPORTED_DEAL_ID  ,
NPTL.DISTRIBUTOR_PART_NUMBER       ,
NPTL.DROP_SHIP_FLAG                ,
NPTL.DISTI_RPTD_END_CUST_VAT_NUMBER,
NPTL.DIST_RPTD_END_USR_EML_CT_NAME ,
NPTL.DIST_RPTD_END_USR_CONTACT_NAME,
NPTL.DIST_RPTD_END_USR_CT_TEL_NUM  ,
NPTL.END_CUST_TO_RESELLER_PO_NUM   ,
NPTL.EXPORT_REFERENCE_NUMBER       ,
Sum(CASE WHEN DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('OFFSET','BIB OFFSET') THEN -1*NPTL.INSTALLATION_AMOUNT*NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100 *Coalesce(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100 
WHEN  DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED','BIB') THEN NPTL.INSTALLATION_AMOUNT*NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100 *Coalesce(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100  ELSE NULL END)  AS  INSTALLATION_AMOUNT   ,      
NPTL.DISTRIBUTOR_INVOICE_NUMBER    ,
Sum(CASE WHEN DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('OFFSET','BIB OFFSET') THEN -1*NPTL.MAINTENANCE_AMOUNT*NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100 *Coalesce(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100 
WHEN  DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED','BIB') THEN NPTL.MAINTENANCE_AMOUNT*NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100   *Coalesce(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100  ELSE NULL END)  AS  MAINTENANCE_AMOUNT   ,   
 Sum(CASE WHEN DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('OFFSET','BIB OFFSET') THEN -1*NPTL.MANAGED_SERVICE_AMOUNT*NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100  *Coalesce(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100 
WHEN  DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED','BIB') THEN NPTL.MANAGED_SERVICE_AMOUNT*NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100 *Coalesce(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100  ELSE NULL END)  AS  MANAGED_SERVICE_AMOUNT   ,     
NPTL.MARKET_TYPE_CODE              ,
NPTL.OFFICIAL_SALE_FLAG            ,
Sum(CASE WHEN DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('OFFSET','BIB OFFSET') THEN -1*NPTL.OTHER_CONSULTING_AMOUNT*NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100 *Coalesce(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100  
WHEN  DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED','BIB') THEN NPTL.OTHER_CONSULTING_AMOUNT*NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100 *Coalesce(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100  ELSE NULL END)  AS  OTHER_CONSULTING_AMOUNT   ,  
Sum(CASE WHEN DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('OFFSET','BIB OFFSET') THEN -1*Coalesce(NPTL.PRODUCT_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT,0)*NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100 *Coalesce(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100 
 WHEN DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED','BIB') THEN Coalesce(NPTL.PRODUCT_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT,0)*NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100 *Coalesce(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100 
 ELSE NULL
 END) AS PRODUCT_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT,   
NPTL.POS_TRX_LINE_PRODUCT_QUANT POS_TRX_LINE_PRODUCT_QUANT  ,
NPTL.LINKSYS_FLAG                  ,
NPTL.POS_TRX_LINE_POSTED_DATE      ,
Sum(CASE WHEN DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('OFFSET','BIB OFFSET') THEN -1*NPTL.PROFESSIONAL_SERVICE_AMOUNT*NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100 *Coalesce(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100  
WHEN  DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED','BIB') THEN NPTL.PROFESSIONAL_SERVICE_AMOUNT*NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100 *Coalesce(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100  ELSE NULL END)  AS  PROFESSIONAL_SERVICE_AMOUNT,   
Sum(CASE WHEN DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('OFFSET','BIB OFFSET') THEN -1*NPTL.RPTD_EXTENDED_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT*NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100 *Coalesce(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100 
WHEN  DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED','BIB') THEN NPTL.RPTD_EXTENDED_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT*NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100 *Coalesce(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100  ELSE NULL END) AS  RPTD_EXTENDED_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT, 
Sum(CASE WHEN DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('OFFSET','BIB OFFSET') THEN -1*NPTL.RPTD_NET_UNIT_PRICE_USD_AMT*NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100 *Coalesce(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100 
WHEN  DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED','BIB') THEN NPTL.RPTD_NET_UNIT_PRICE_USD_AMT*NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100 *Coalesce(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100  ELSE NULL END) AS  RPTD_NET_UNIT_PRICE_USD_AMT   ,   
Sum(CASE WHEN DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('OFFSET','BIB OFFSET') THEN -1*NPTL.RPTD_UNIT_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT*NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100 *Coalesce(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100 
WHEN  DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED','BIB') THEN NPTL.RPTD_UNIT_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT*NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100 *Coalesce(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100  ELSE NULL END) AS  RPTD_UNIT_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT    ,   
Sum(CASE WHEN DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('OFFSET','BIB OFFSET') THEN -1*NPTL.RPTD_UNIT_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT*NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100 *Coalesce(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100 
WHEN  DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED','BIB') THEN NPTL.RPTD_UNIT_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT*NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100 *Coalesce(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100  ELSE NULL END) AS  RPTD_UNIT_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT     ,  
NPTL.SVC_CONTRACT_CENTER_QUOTE_NUM ,
NPTL.SECOND_SOURCE_FLAG            ,
NPTL.DST_RPTD_2ND_SRC_DST_CTRY_CODE,
NPTL.DISTI_RPTD_2ND_SRC_DISTI_NAME ,
NPTL.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER       ,
NPTL.DISTRIBUTOR_SHIP_DATE         ,
NPTL.SPECIAL_DISCOUNT_PERCENTAGE   ,
NPTL.POS_TRX_LINE_ACTIVE_FLAG      ,
Sum(CASE WHEN DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('OFFSET','BIB OFFSET') THEN -1*NPTL.TRANSPORT_AMOUNT*NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100  *Coalesce(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100 
WHEN  DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED','BIB') THEN NPTL.TRANSPORT_AMOUNT*NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100 *Coalesce(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100  ELSE NULL END) AS TRANSPORT_AMOUNT             ,   
Sum(Cast(CASE WHEN DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('OFFSET','BIB OFFSET') THEN -1*NPTL.VLDTD_NET_UNIT_PRICE_USD_AMT*NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100 *Coalesce(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100 
WHEN  DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED','BIB') THEN NPTL.VLDTD_NET_UNIT_PRICE_USD_AMT*NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100 *Coalesce(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100 ELSE NULL END AS DECIMAL(18,6)))  AS  VLDTD_NET_UNIT_PRICE_USD_AMT  ,  
Sum(CASE WHEN DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('OFFSET','BIB OFFSET') THEN -1*NPTL.VLDTD_NET_UNIT_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT*NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100 *Coalesce(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100 
WHEN  DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED','BIB') THEN NPTL.VLDTD_NET_UNIT_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT*NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100 *Coalesce(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100 ELSE NULL END) AS  VLDTD_NET_UNIT_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,  
Sum(CASE WHEN DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('OFFSET','BIB OFFSET') THEN -1*NPTL.VALUATION_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT*NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100  *Coalesce(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100 
WHEN  DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED','BIB') THEN NPTL.VALUATION_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT*NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100 *Coalesce(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100 ELSE NULL END) AS  VALUATION_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT    ,   
Sum(CASE WHEN DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('OFFSET','BIB OFFSET') THEN -1*NPTL.VALUATION_PRICE_LOCAL_AMOUNT*NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100  *Coalesce(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100 
WHEN  DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED','BIB') THEN NPTL.VALUATION_PRICE_LOCAL_AMOUNT*NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100 *Coalesce(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100 ELSE NULL END) AS  VALUATION_PRICE_LOCAL_AMOUNT  ,  
NPTL.DISTRIBUTOR_WAREHOUSE_NUMBER  ,
NPTL.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE      ,
NPTL.POS_TRANSACTION_TYPE_CODE     ,
NPTL.PROMOTION_NAME                ,
Sum(CASE WHEN DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('OFFSET','BIB OFFSET') THEN -1*NPTL.DISTI_RPTD_COST_UNIT_PRICE_AMT*NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100 *Coalesce(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100 
WHEN  DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED','BIB') THEN NPTL.DISTI_RPTD_COST_UNIT_PRICE_AMT*NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100 *Coalesce(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100 ELSE NULL END) AS  DISTI_RPTD_COST_UNIT_PRICE_AMT,   
NPTL.DISTI_RPTD_PROMOTION_NAME     ,
NPTL.DISTI_RPTD_PROMOTION_TYPE_CODE,
NPTL.POS_TRX_REBILL_FLAG           ,
NPTL.RU_CAD_PO_NUMBER              ,
NPTL.RU_RSLR_TO_DISTI_ACCOUT_NUMBER,
NPTL.RU_RSLR_TO_DISTI_PO_NUMBER    ,
NPTL.RU_DISTI_RPTD_SALES_ORDER_DATE,
NPTL.RU_MANAGED_SERVICE_TYPE_CODE  ,
NPTL.RU_SOLUTION_ID                ,
NPTL.RU_SOLUTION_SOLD_DATE         ,
NPTL.RU_SOLUTION_LENGTH_INT        ,
NPTL.RU_DISTI_TO_SP_INVOICE_NUMBER ,
NPTL.RU_SP_TO_END_USER_INVOICE_NUM ,
Sum(CASE WHEN DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('OFFSET','BIB OFFSET') THEN -1*NPTL.RU_RET_ORIG_BS_LST_U_PRICE_AMT*NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100 *Coalesce(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100 
WHEN  DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED','BIB') THEN NPTL.RU_RET_ORIG_BS_LST_U_PRICE_AMT*NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100 *Coalesce(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100 ELSE NULL END) AS  RU_RET_ORIG_BS_LST_U_PRICE_AMT,  
Sum(CASE WHEN DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('OFFSET','BIB OFFSET') THEN -1*NPTL.RU_RET_ORIG_CST_U_PRICE_AMT*NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100  *Coalesce(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100 
WHEN  DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED','BIB') THEN NPTL.RU_RET_ORIG_CST_U_PRICE_AMT*NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100 *Coalesce(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100 ELSE NULL END) AS  RU_RET_ORIG_CST_U_PRICE_AMT   ,  
NPTL.RU_RET_ORIG_DISTI_SO_NUM      ,
NPTL.RU_RET_ORIG_DISTI2RSLR_INV_NUM,
NPTL.RU_RET_ORIG_DISTI_INV_NUM     ,
NPTL.DISTI_RPTD_CAM_NAME           ,
NPTL.BK_CAM_PARTY_KEY              ,
NPTL.BK_DEAL_ID                    ,
NPTL.BK_LOCAL_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE    ,
NPTL.BK_REBILL_POS_TRANSACTION_ID  ,
NPTL.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT     ,
NPTL.BK_SECONDARY_RESELLER_ID      ,
NPTL.RU_BK_RET_POS_TRANSACTION_ID  ,
NPTL.POS_SOURCE_TYPE               ,
NPTL.ELIG_FOR_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE    ,
NPTL.RU_ALLOCATED_TYPE             ,
NPTL.POS_RETURN_ROLE               ,
USER EDW_CREATE_USER               ,
USER EDW_UPDATE_USER               ,
Current_Timestamp(0) EDW_CREATE_DATETIME           ,
Current_Timestamp(0) EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME           ,
NPTL.BATCH_ID_INT                  ,
NPTL.DISTI_RPTD_DISTI_WHSE_NUM     ,
NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY AS PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
NPTL.BK_SHIP_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY  ,
NPTL.BK_BILL_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY  ,
NPTL.BK_END_USER_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY ,
NPTL.BK_SOLD_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY  ,
NPTL.SOLD_TO_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY   ,
NPTL.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY        ,
NPTL.DISTI_RPTD_SLD_TO_EMAIL_NAME  ,
NPTL.DISTI_RPTD_PARTNER_CERT_CD    ,
NPTL.DUPLICATE_POS_TRX_ID_INT      ,
NPTL.SERIAL_NUM_STATUS_SUMMARY_NAME,
NPTL.DISTI_RPTD_SLD_TO_TEL_NUM     ,
NPTL.DSTI_RPTD_SLD_TO_CNTCT_NAME   ,
NPTL.DISTI_RPTD_SVC_SLS_ORD_NUM    ,
NPTL.DISTI_RPTD_PARTNER_ID_INT     ,
NPTL.ADJUSTED_FLG                  ,
NPTL.RU_CISCO_TO_SVC_PROV_SO_NUM   ,
NPTL.DD_ORIGINAL_BATCH_ID_INT      ,
NPTL.DISTI_RPTD_SVC_PROVIDER_NAME  ,
NPTL.OPPORTUNITY_KEY               ,
NPTL.LAST_SOURCE_UPDATE_DTM        ,
NPTL.DISTI_RPTD_CSC_SVC_PVDR_PO_NUM,
NPTL.SOURCE_RPRTD_RSLLR_CRTFCTN_CD ,
NPTL.SOURCE_RPRTD_RSLLR_AREA_NAME  ,
NPTL.SRC_RPRTD_END_CSTMR_AREA_NAME ,
NPTL.SOURCE_RPRTD_PARTNER_ID_INT   ,
NPTL.SOURCE_RPRTD_PRTNR_STATUS_CD  ,
NPTL.SOURCE_RPRTD_PARTNER_TYPE_CD  ,
NPTL.SRC_RPRTD_VRTCL_MKT_SGMNT_CD  ,
Sum(CASE WHEN DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('OFFSET','BIB OFFSET') THEN -1*NPTL.PRE_UPLFT_VLD_N_UPR_LC_CUR_AMT*NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100 *Coalesce(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100 
WHEN  DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED','BIB') THEN NPTL.PRE_UPLFT_VLD_N_UPR_LC_CUR_AMT*NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100 *Coalesce(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100 ELSE NULL END) AS  PRE_UPLFT_VLD_N_UPR_LC_CUR_AMT,  
Sum(CASE WHEN DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('OFFSET','BIB OFFSET') THEN -1*NPTL.PRE_UPLFT_VLD_NT_U_PR_USD_AMT*NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100 *Coalesce(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100 
WHEN DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED','BIB') THEN NPTL.PRE_UPLFT_VLD_NT_U_PR_USD_AMT*NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100 *Coalesce(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100 ELSE NULL END) AS  PRE_UPLFT_VLD_NT_U_PR_USD_AMT ,  
Sum(CASE WHEN DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('OFFSET','BIB OFFSET') THEN -1*Coalesce(NPTL.GROSS_POS_REVALUED_USD_AMT,0)*NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100 *Coalesce(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100 
 WHEN DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED','BIB') THEN Coalesce(NPTL.GROSS_POS_REVALUED_USD_AMT,0)*NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100 *Coalesce(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100 
 ELSE NULL
 END) AS GROSS_POS_REVALUED_USD_AMT,   
 NPTL.BK_BOOKING_POS_TRX_ID_INT     ,
NPTL.DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD            ,
NPTL.BK_TOP_BKGS_POS_TRX_ID_INT    ,
NPTL.LINE_STATUS_CD                ,
Sum(Coalesce(CASE WHEN DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('OFFSET','BIB OFFSET') THEN -1*NPTL.PRDT_NET_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT*NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100 *Coalesce(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100 
WHEN  DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED','BIB') THEN NPTL.PRDT_NET_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT*NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100 *Coalesce(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,100)/100  ELSE NULL END, 0)) AS PRDT_NET_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT      ,  
NPOSOA.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   ,
NPTL.PRODUCT_KEY AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY      ,
CASE WHEN NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_CD ='UNKNOWN' THEN CASE WHEN NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_TOP_SKU_FLG='Y' THEN 'OFFSET' ELSE 'ATTRIBUTED' END 
     ELSE NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_CD END AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD   ,
     NPOSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT               ,
NPOSOA.POB_TYPE_CD                   ,
NPOSOA.DV_POB_TOP_PRDT_KEY    ,
Coalesce(SCA.PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,-999) AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  
,NPTL.PRODUCT_SUBSCRIPTION_FLG AS DV_PRODUCT_SUBSCRIPTION_FLG,
/* Added as part of SFP  Rel */
NPTL.DISTRI_EXTERNAL_SOL_NUM,
NPTL.MAGIC_KEY_ID,
NPTL.CISCO_INTERNAL_POS_FLG,
NPTL.NET_PRICE_FLG,
NPTL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
FROM
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE  NPTL
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRX_LINE_OFFER_ATRBTN NPOSOA
 ON NPOSOA.TOP_SKU_POS_TRX_ID_INT=NPTL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
 AND NPTL.TRANSACTION_DATE >= '2019-04-28' 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RF
ON    ( RF.CALENDAR_DATE=NPTL.TRANSACTION_DATE  ) 
LEFT JOIN $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_POS_SCA_ADJ_CNG_DRCT_NRT_TV SCA
ON SCA.PD_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT=NPTL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
AND  DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG='N'  
 AND END_TV_DTM='3500-01-01 00:00:00'
WHERE 
   (NPOSOA.EDW_UPDATE_DTM > '$$LastExtractDate' OR NPTL.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME > '$$LastExtractDate' )
GROUP BY
NPTL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT     ,
NPTL.DISTI_TO_RESELLER_SO_NUMBER   ,
NPTL.TRANSACTION_DATE  ,
NPTL.DIST_RPTD_SALES_REP_NAME      ,
NPTL.DIST_RPTD_CISCO_SO_NUM        ,
NPTL.DISTI_SO_LINE_NUMBER          ,
NPTL.DISTI_2_CISCO_PO_NUMBER       ,
NPTL.DISTI_SBMTD_CISCO_CONTRACT_NUM,
NPTL.DST_SBMTD_CSCO_CTRCT_TYP_DESCR,
NPTL.DISTI_2_DISTI_TRX_FLAG        ,
NPTL.DISTRIBUTOR_REPORTED_DEAL_ID  ,
NPTL.DISTRIBUTOR_PART_NUMBER       ,
NPTL.DROP_SHIP_FLAG                ,
NPTL.DISTI_RPTD_END_CUST_VAT_NUMBER,
NPTL.DIST_RPTD_END_USR_EML_CT_NAME ,
NPTL.DIST_RPTD_END_USR_CONTACT_NAME,
NPTL.DIST_RPTD_END_USR_CT_TEL_NUM  ,
NPTL.END_CUST_TO_RESELLER_PO_NUM   ,
NPTL.EXPORT_REFERENCE_NUMBER       ,
NPTL.DISTRIBUTOR_INVOICE_NUMBER    ,
NPTL.MARKET_TYPE_CODE              ,
NPTL.OFFICIAL_SALE_FLAG            ,
POS_TRX_LINE_PRODUCT_QUANT         ,   
NPTL.LINKSYS_FLAG                  ,
NPTL.POS_TRX_LINE_POSTED_DATE      ,
